button.name: action_generate_data
button.confirm: Auto-populate Schedule 1 and 2 from posted journal entries. Continue?

button.name: action_generate_data
button.confirm: This will overwrite Schedule 1 and 2 lines. Continue?

button.name: action_file
button.confirm: Mark this return as Filed with the BIR? This cannot be undone.

button.name: action_sync_from_schedules
button.help: Update Part II summary fields from schedule line totals.

button.name: action_create_monthly_returns
button.confirm: Create draft returns for all 12 months of this year? Existing months will be skipped.

sheet.div: This return has been cancelled and is no longer active.

page.name: sch1
page.p: Schedule of Sales/Receipts and Output Tax. Lines here feed into Items 12A and 12B. Output Tax is auto-computed at 12%.

page.name: sch2
page.p: Purchases/Importation of Capital Goods with aggregate amount not exceeding ₱1 Million. Feeds into Items 18A and 18B.

page.name: sch3
page.p: Purchases/Importation of Capital Goods exceeding ₱1 Million. Allowable input tax is amortized over the estimated/recognized life (max 60 months). Feeds into Items 18C, 18D, and 20A.

page.string: Sch.4 — Input Tax on Govt Sales
page.name: sch4
page.p: Input Tax Attributable to Sale to Government. Feeds into Item 20B.

page.string: Sch.5 — Input Tax on Exempt Sales
page.name: sch5
page.p: Input Tax Attributable to Exempt Sales. Feeds into Item 20C.

page.name: sch6
page.p: Tax Withheld Claimed as Tax Credit (BIR Form 2307). Feeds into Item 23A.

page.name: sch7
page.p: Schedule of Advance Payments (Sugar and Flour Industries). Feeds into Item 23B.

page.string: Sch.8 — VAT Withheld on Govt Sales
page.name: sch8
page.p: VAT Withheld on Sales to Government. Feeds into Item 23C.

page.name: sch1
page.p: Schedule of Sales/Receipts and Output Tax per industry. Click Sync from Schedules after editing to update Items 12A/12B. Output Tax is auto-computed at 12% per line.

page.name: sch2
page.p: Purchases/Importation of Capital Goods not exceeding ₱1M. Feeds into Items 18A and 18B.

page.name: sch3
page.p: Capital Goods exceeding ₱1M. Input tax is amortized over estimated life (max 60 months). Feeds into Items 18C, 18D, and 20A.

page.string: Page 2 — Sch.4 Input Tax on Govt Sales
page.name: sch4
page.p: Input Tax Attributable to Sale to Government. Feeds into Item 20B.

page.string: Page 2 — Sch.5 Input Tax on Exempt Sales
page.name: sch5
page.p: Input Tax Attributable to Exempt Sales. Feeds into Item 20C.

page.name: sch6
page.p: Tax Withheld Claimed as Tax Credit (BIR Form 2307). Feeds into Item 23A.

page.name: sch7
page.p: Advance Payments for Sugar and Flour Industries. Feeds into Item 23B.

page.string: Page 2 — Sch.8 VAT on Govt Sales
page.name: sch8
page.p: VAT Withheld on Sales to Government. Feeds into Item 23C.

field.name: notes
field.placeholder: Internal notes, BIR reference numbers, filing instructions...

field.name: help
field.p: Create your first Monthly VAT Declaration. Use "Create All 12 Months" to batch-create all months for a year at once.
